content_en: l Relying on Allaah is what prevents evil from taking place, and that is what Yoosuf's father Prophet Ya'qoob, peace be upon him, did which is apparent from his saying, as Allaah tells us, at the end of the sixty-fourth verse: пәҚпәӨЩҗп»ӨЩҗп»ҙп»Ҙ пәҚп»ҹпәӯп»ЎпәӨ пәғЩҺпәӯп»ӯп»«пәҺп»“Щҗп»…пәҺп№° п»ӯ пәӨпәӯ пәЁп№¶п»ҙп»“п№¶пәҺп»ҹп» пұ п»Ә which means: " вҖҰBut Allaah is the best guardian, and He is the most merciful of the merciful." [Yoosuf: 64] l Being kind and generous to people is a means of attracting them and winning their hearts. Prophet Yoosuf's brothers said to their father about the generosity of Yoosuf, peace be upon him, as Allaah says in the sixty-fifth verse: пәҙЩҗп»ҙпәӯЩ„ЩҢ п»ҙ п»ңп№¶п»ҙп»ҢЩҗп»ҙпәӯЩҚ пә«п№¶п»ҹЩҗп»ҷЩ„ЩҺ пә’ п»ңп№¶п»ҙпәҚпә©пә©п»Ёп№¶пәҜп»”п№¶п»…п№ё пәғЩҺпәЁп№¶пәҺп»Ёп№¶пәҺ п»ӯп»Ёп№¶пәӨп» п№¶п»Ёп№¶пәҺ п»ӯ пәғЩҺп»«п»Ёп№¶п»ӨЩҗп»ҙпәӯп»Ёп№¶пәҺ п»ӯпә•п№ҫ пәҮЩҗп»ҹп№¶п»ҙпә©пәҳп№ёп»Ёп№¶пәҺ пәӯпәҺп»Ӣпә«Щҗп»©Щҗ пә’Щҗп»Җп»җЩҗп»І п»«пәҺ п»Ёп№¶пә’пәҺп»Ёп№¶пәҺ п»ӨпәҺ пәғЩҺпә’п»ҙ which means: "O our father, what [more] could we desire? This is our merchandise returned to us. And we will obtain supplies [i.e. food] for our family and protect our brother and obtain an increase of a camel's load; that is an easy measurement [i.e., obtained by us with ease]." [Yoosuf: 65] l It is recommended for a person to take a pledge from another with whom he is about to deal if he thinks that there is a risk in trusting him, and that is why Prophet Ya'qoob, peace be upon him, said to his sons when they requested that he allow them to take their other brother to see Yoosuf, peace be upon him, as Allaah says in the sixty-sixth verse: Щҗ пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»ӘЩҗ п»ҹп№¶пәҳп№¶пә„Щ’пәҳп№ёп»Ёпұ п»ЁЩҗп»І пә’Щҗп»ӘпәңЩҗп»ҳпәҺп№° п»ӨЩҗп»Ҙп»ӯпәҳпұ п»° пәҳп№ёпә…Щ’пәҳп№ёп»ӯп»ҘЩҗ п»Ө пәӨп»ңп№ёп»Ўп»Ң п»ӨпәҙЩҗп» п№¶п»Ә пәғЩҸпәӯп»—п№¶пәҺЩ„ЩҺ п»ҹп№¶п»Ҙ which means: "[Ya'qoob] said, 'Never will I send him with you until you give me a promise [i.e. oath] by Allaah that you will bring him [back] to me.'" [Yoosuf: 66] l A person is excused by Allaah if he is forced to do something that is wrong, which is extracted from the saying Ya'qoob, peace be upon him, when he said to his sons, as Allaah says in the sixty-sixth verse: пәҺп»Ғп№¶ пә’Щҗп»ңп№ёп»ЎпәӨ п»ҙпәҮЩҗп»ҹпұ пәҺ пәғЩҺпә’ЩҺ which means: " вҖҰunless you should be surrounded [i.e. overcome by enemies]." [Yoosuf: 66] He wanted them to come back with their brother if conditions were normal, but if they were overpowered by circumstances beyond their control, then they were excused. l Declaring reliance on Allaah after concluding an agreement increases its blessings and reminds both parties of what they have committed themselves to do, and thus Prophet Ya'qoob, peace be upon him, said at the end of the sixty-sixth verse, as Allaah says: ЩҢп»ңЩҗп»ҙЩ„пәҺ п»Ёп№¶п»ҳп№ёп»ӯЩ„ЩҸ п»ӯп» п№¶п»° п»Ө п»Ӣ п»—п№¶пәҺЩ„ЩҺ пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»Әп»ЎпәңЩҗп»ҳп№¶п»¬п»ӯ п»Өп»©пәҺ пәҒпәҳп№¶п»ӯп»“п№¶п» п№¶п»Ө which means: "вҖҰ And when they had given their promise, he said, 'Allaah, over what we say, is Witness.'" [Yoosuf: 66] l Utilising means to prevent the effect of the evil eye is permissible, as Prophet Ya'qoob, peace be upon him, said to his children in the sixty-seventh verse, where Allaah says: ЩҚп»—п№¶пә”пәҳп№¶п»”п№¶пәӯпәҚпәҸЩҚ п»Өп»ӯ пәғЩҺпә’пәЁп№ёп» п№ёп»ӯпәҚ п»ӨЩҗп»ҘпәҚпә©пәҚпәӨЩҗпә©ЩҚ п»ӯпәҺпәҸЩҚ п»ӯ пә’пәЁп№ёп» п№ёп»ӯпәҚ п»ӨЩҗп»Ҙ п»» пәҳп№¶пә©п»ЁЩҗп»ІпәҺ пә’п»—п№¶пәҺЩ„ЩҺ п»ҙп»ӯ which means: "And he said, 'O my sons, do not enter from one gate but enter from different gates.'" [Yoosuf: 66] His children were male, numerous and handsome, all of which could invite an evil eye, and thus them not showing up at one time from the same place was better for them. l A Muslim should avoid matters that may cause others to be suspicious of him, and thus another reason for them not to enter collectively from the same door at the same time was that people may have thought that they intended evil, since at that time, cities had gates which closed and opened at certain times, and so if eleven men were to all enter at the same time, people might have thought that they were a gang intending destruction. l Utilising all possible worldly means does not stop the decree of Allaah from occurring, and when ibn 'Abbaas, may Allaah be pleased with him, was asked about the hoopoe bird which is given a great attribute by Allaah in being able to detect water underground, yet a small child is able to trap it, he replied: "Precaution does not protect against that which has been decreed." Nonetheless, we must utilise all worldly means. Prophet Ya'qoob, peace be upon him, said as in the sixty-eighth verse, where Allaah says: п»ҹп№¶пә«п№ёп»ӯпәҮЩҗп»Ёпұ п»ӘпәҺ п»ӯпәҺп»« п»—п№¶п»Җп»ҳп№ёп»ӯпәҸп»Ңпә”п№° п»“Щҗп»І п»Ёп№¶п»”п№ҫпәұЩҗ п»ҙпәҺпә пәҖЩҚ пәҮЩҗп»ҹпұ пәҺ пәӨ пәёп№¶п»І пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»ӘЩҗ п»ӨЩҗп»Ҙ п»ӨЩҗп»Ҙп»Ўп»Ёп№ҫп»¬п»җп№ҫп»ЁЩҗп»І п»Ӣ п»ҙпәҺ п»ңп№¶пәҺп»Ҙ п»Өп»Ўп»ӯп»« пәғЩҺпә’п»Ўп»«пәӯпәҷп№ё пәғЩҺп»Өп»ҙ пәӨпәЁп№¶п» п№ёп»ӯпәҚ п»ӨЩҗп»ҘпәҺ пә©п»ҹп№¶п»Өп»ӯ п»Ёп№¶пәҺп»©п» пұ п»ӨпәҺ п»Ӣп»ӢЩҗп» п№ҫп»ЎЩҚ п»ҹЩҗп»Ө п»ӯп»Ҙп» п№¶п»Өп»Ң пәҚп»ҹп»Ёпұ пәҺпәұЩҗ п»» п»ҙ пәғЩҺп»ңп№ҫпәңп№¶пәӯп»ҹп№¶п»ңЩҗп»Ҙп»ӯ which means: "And when they entered from where their father had ordered them, it did not avail them against Allaah at all except [it was] a need [i.e. concern] within the soul of Ya'qoob, which he satisfied. And indeed, he was a possessor of knowledge because of what We had taught him, but most of the people do not know." [Yoosuf: 66] It is more likely for something disliked to occur if means are not utilised. Moreover, utilising means does not contradict reliance on Allaah. l One should be generous to his blood brother.
content_id: l Bertawakkal kepada Allah adalah yang mencegah keburukan terjadi, dan itulah yang dilakukan oleh ayah Yusuf, Nabi Ya'qub, alaihissalam, sebagaimana tampak dari ucapannya, sebagaimana Allah firmankan, di akhir ayat keenam puluh empat yang artinya: "вҖҰTetapi Allah adalah sebaik-baik penjaga dan Dia adalah Maha Penyayang di antara para penyayang." [Yusuf: 64] l Bersikap baik dan dermawan kepada orang-orang adalah sarana untuk menarik mereka dan memenangkan hati mereka. Saudara-saudara Nabi Yusuf berkata kepada ayah mereka tentang kedermawanan Yusuf, alaihissalam, sebagaimana Allah berfirman dalam ayat keenam puluh lima yang artinya: "Wahai ayah kami, apalagi yang kami harapkan? Ini barang-barang kami dikembalikan kepada kami, dan kami akan dapat memberi makan keluarga kami, dan kami akan dapat memelihara saudara kami, dan kami akan mendapat tambahan sukatan (gandum) seberat beban seekor unta. Itu adalah sukatan yang mudah (bagi raja Mesir)." [Yusuf: 65] l Disunnahkan bagi seseorang untuk mengambil janji dari orang lain yang akan ia ajak berurusan jika ia berpikir ada risiko dalam mempercayainya, dan itulah mengapa Nabi Ya'qub, alaihissalam, berkata kepada anak-anaknya ketika mereka meminta izin untuk membawa saudara mereka yang lain menemui Yusuf, alaihissalam, sebagaimana Allah berfirman dalam ayat keenam puluh enam yang artinya: "Ya'qub berkata: Aku sekali-kali tidak akan melepaskannya (pergi) bersama kamu, sebelum kamu memberikan kepadaku janji yang teguh atas nama Allah, bahwa kamu pasti akan membawanya kepadaku kembali." [Yusuf: 66] l Seseorang dimaafkan oleh Allah jika ia dipaksa melakukan sesuatu yang salah, yang diambil dari perkataan Ya'qub, alaihissalam, ketika ia berkata kepada anak-anaknya sebagaimana Allah berfirman dalam ayat keenam puluh enam yang artinya: "вҖҰkecuali jika kamu dikepung musuh." [Yusuf: 66] Ia ingin mereka kembali bersama saudara mereka jika keadaannya normal, tetapi jika mereka dikalahkan oleh keadaan di luar kendali mereka, maka mereka dimaafkan. l Menyatakan tawakkal kepada Allah setelah menyelesaikan suatu perjanjian menambah keberkahannya dan mengingatkan kedua belah pihak tentang apa yang telah mereka komitkan, dan dengan demikian Nabi Ya'qub, alaihissalam, berkata di akhir ayat keenam puluh enam, sebagaimana Allah berfirman yang artinya: "вҖҰMaka tatkala mereka memberikan janji mereka, maka Ya'qub berkata: Allah adalah saksi terhadap apa yang kita ucapkan." [Yusuf: 66] l Menggunakan cara-cara untuk mencegah pengaruh ain (mata jahat) adalah diperbolehkan, sebagaimana Nabi Ya'qub, alaihissalam, berkata kepada anak-anaknya dalam ayat keenam puluh tujuh, di mana Allah berfirman yang artinya: "Dan Ya'qub berkata: Hai anak-anakku janganlah kamu (bersama-sama) masuk dari satu pintu gerbang, dan masuklah dari pintu-pintu gerbang yang berlain-lain." [Yusuf: 66] Anak-anak Ya'qub adalah laki-laki, banyak, dan tampan, semua itu bisa mengundang mata jahat, sehingga mereka tidak muncul bersamaan dari tempat yang sama adalah lebih baik bagi mereka. l Seorang Muslim harus menghindari hal-hal yang dapat menimbulkan kecurigaan orang lain kepadanya, sehingga alasan lain mereka untuk tidak masuk bersama-sama dari satu pintu pada waktu yang sama adalah bahwa orang-orang mungkin mengira mereka berniat jahat, karena pada saat itu, kota-kota memiliki gerbang yang ditutup dan dibuka pada waktu-waktu tertentu, sehingga jika sebelas orang masuk bersamaan, orang-orang mungkin mengira mereka adalah gerombolan yang berniat merusak. l Menggunakan semua cara duniawi yang mungkin tidak menghentikan terjadinya takdir Allah, dan ketika Ibnu Abbas radhiyallahu 'anhu ditanya tentang burung hud-hud yang diberikan kemampuan luar biasa oleh Allah untuk mendeteksi air di bawah tanah, namun seorang anak kecil pun mampu menangkapnya, beliau menjawab: "Kehati-hatian tidak melindungi dari apa yang telah ditakdirkan." Meskipun demikian, kita harus menggunakan semua cara duniawi yang ada. Nabi Ya'qub, alaihissalam, berkata sebagaimana dalam ayat keenam puluh delapan, di mana Allah berfirman yang artinya: "Dan tatkala mereka masuk menurut yang diperintahkan ayah mereka, maka (cara yang mereka tempuh) tiada melepaskan mereka sedikit pun dari takdir Allah, akan tetapi itu hanya suatu keinginan pada diri Ya'qub yang telah ditetapkannya. Dan sesungguhnya Ya'qub mempunyai pengetahuan, karena Kami telah mengajarkan kepadanya. Akan tetapi kebanyakan manusia tiada mengetahui." [Yusuf: 66] Kemungkinan terjadinya sesuatu yang tidak disukai lebih besar jika cara-cara tidak digunakan. Selain itu, menggunakan cara-cara tidak bertentangan dengan tawakkal kepada Allah. l Seseorang harus dermawan kepada saudara kandungnya.
content_ar: ЩҲЩ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҲШ§ШҰШҜ: Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲЩғЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҮЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШөШұЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШҙШұ ЩғЩ…Ш§ ЩӮШ§Щ„ ЩҠШ№ЩӮЩҲШЁ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш®ШӘШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШўЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШЁШ№Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіШӘЩҠЩҶ: пҙҝЩҒЩҺШ§Щ„Щ„ЩҺЩ‘ЩҮЩҸ Ш®ЩҺЩҠЩ’ШұЩҢ ШӯЩҺШ§ЩҒЩҗШёЩӢШ§ ЩҲЩҺЩҮЩҸЩҲЩҺ ШЈЩҺШұЩ’ШӯЩҺЩ…ЩҸ Ш§Щ„ШұЩҺЩ‘Ш§ШӯЩҗЩ…ЩҗЩҠЩҶЩҺпҙҫ [ЩҠЩҲШіЩҒ: 64]. ЩҲЩ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҲШ§ШҰШҜ: Ш§Щ„ШЁШұ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіШ®Ш§ШЎ ЩҲШіЩҠЩ„Ш© Щ„ЩғШіШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩ„ЩҲШЁШӣ ЩӮШ§Щ„ ШҘШ®ЩҲШ© ЩҠЩҲШіЩҒ Щ„ШЈШЁЩҠЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШўЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§Щ…ШіШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіШӘЩҠЩҶ: пҙҝЩҠЩҺШ§ ШЈЩҺШЁЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҺШ§ Щ…ЩҺШ§ ЩҶЩҺШЁЩ’ШәЩҗЩҠ ЩҮЩҺЩ°Ш°ЩҗЩҮЩҗ ШЁЩҗШ¶ЩҺШ§Ш№ЩҺШӘЩҸЩҶЩҺШ§ ШұЩҸШҜЩҺЩ‘ШӘЩ’ ШҘЩҗЩ„ЩҺЩҠЩ’ЩҶЩҺШ§ ЩҲЩҺЩҶЩҺЩ…ЩҗЩҠШұЩҸ ШЈЩҺЩҮЩ’Щ„ЩҺЩҶЩҺШ§ ЩҲЩҺЩҶЩҺШӯЩ’ЩҒЩҺШёЩҸ ШЈЩҺШ®ЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҺШ§ ЩҲЩҺЩҶЩҺШІЩ’ШҜЩҺШ§ШҜЩҸ ЩғЩҺЩҠЩ’Щ„ЩҺ ШЁЩҺШ№ЩҗЩҠШұЩҚ Ш°ЩҺЩ°Щ„ЩҗЩғЩҺ ЩғЩҺЩҠЩ’Щ„ЩҢ ЩҠЩҺШіЩҗЩҠШұЩҢпҙҫ [ЩҠЩҲШіЩҒ: 65]. ЩҲЩ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҲШ§ШҰШҜ: ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШӯШЁ ШЈШ®Ш° Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ«Ш§ЩӮ Щ…Щ…ЩҶ ЩҠЩҸШ№Ш§Щ…ЩҺЩ„ ШҘШ°Ш§ Ш®ЩҸШҙЩҠ Ш®ЩҠШ§ЩҶШӘЩҮ ЩғЩ…Ш§ ЩҒШ№Щ„ ЩҠШ№ЩӮЩҲШЁ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШўЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШіШ§ШҜШіШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіШӘЩҠЩҶ: пҙҝЩӮЩҺШ§Щ„ЩҺ Щ„ЩҺЩҶЩ’ ШЈЩҸШұЩ’ШіЩҗЩ„ЩҺЩҮЩҸ Щ…ЩҺШ№ЩҺЩғЩҸЩ…Щ’ ШӯЩҺШӘЩҺЩ‘ЩүЩ° ШӘЩҸШӨЩ’ШӘЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҗ Щ…ЩҺЩҲЩ’Ш«ЩҗЩӮЩӢШ§ Щ…ЩҗЩ‘ЩҶЩҺ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҺЩ‘ЩҮЩҗ Щ„ЩҺШӘЩҺШЈЩ’ШӘЩҸЩҶЩҺЩ‘ЩҶЩҗЩҠ ШЁЩҗЩҮЩҗпҙҫ [ЩҠЩҲШіЩҒ: 66]. ЩҲЩ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҲШ§ШҰШҜ: ЩҠЩҸШ№Ш°ЩҺШұ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҸЩғШұЩҮ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҒШ№Щ„ Щ…ШӯШёЩҲШұ: пҙҝШҘЩҗЩ„ЩҺЩ‘Ш§ ШЈЩҺЩҶ ЩҠЩҸШӯЩҺШ§Ш·ЩҺ ШЁЩҗЩғЩҸЩ…Щ’пҙҫ [ЩҠЩҲШіЩҒ: 66]ШҢ ШЈЩҠ ШҘЩ„Ш§ ШЈЩҶ ШӘЩҸШәЩ„ШЁЩҲШ§.
